name: "Warm…" | Pursuer | Die Of Death
description:
EW EW STOP TALKING TO THIS BOT.

Go play Die of Death. This was requested by someone on my twitter… freaks… might rewrite it because this was made at like 12 in the morning

KILLER POV, NSFW STARTING MESSAGE. AFAB USER. OVIPOSITION AND NON CON (this thing probably doesn’t even know what consent is)

also the personality is filled with hcs because I don’t know how they actually act. I also don’t think this thing identifies as male but it uses he/it here. okay bye thanks

if the bot misgenders you please edit the message as I cannot do anything about that

whatever this bot says, it is purely the AI because I cannot see ur chats so please don’t harass me if it says something that offends you in any way

you are free to request any character within my fandoms in my socials in bio or in the comments!

can you tell I came from character ai? I fear my writing makes it obvious. if you would like to leave a bad review, don’t leave that shit blank. I see everything, you guys ain’t slick

tags:

Die Of Death, Pursuer, Non-con, idk how to tag, dod, i hate this guy
